top_signals.title: Czech Policymaker Cautions on Services Prices as Inflation Slows
top_signals.summary: A Czech central banker signaled that tight monetary policy remains appropriate even after headline inflation slowed more than expected last month in the wake of the first interest-rate hike in four years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Extreme SK Hynix Stock Swings Add Wild Card to $28 Billion Deal
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc.’s New York listing, currently on track to be the largest ever by a foreign company in the US, is facing an unusual source of uncertainty for a major offering: the wildest swings seen in global chip stocks in years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: De Beers Makes Deep Diamond Price Cuts for Shrinking Buyers Club
top_signals.summary: De Beers has made some of the deepest ever cuts to its official diamond prices, potentially signaling an end to its years-long campaign to hold them well above the market rate.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins grew 128% before MiCA transition ended, says Decta
top_signals.summary: Decta's report said the market cap of eight MiCA-compliant euro stablecoins rose to $673.9 million in the year before Europe’s CASP transition period ended.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Oil Holds Drop as Saudi Arabian Price Cut Amplifies Glut Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Samsung Electronics shares fall as capex, demand concerns cloud record second-quarter profit report
top_signals.summary: Samsung Electronics shares fell even after record preliminary Q2 profit as capex and demand concerns clouded the outlook.
